note: Palette (bg/ink/accent) is injected by compose.mjs, not stored here, so recycled items get a fresh look. Every stat carries a real source. Copy rule: no em dashes, no colons, no semicolons.

items.support: New ENERGY STAR windows can cut a home's energy bills by about this much vs. old single-pane. Your wallet says thanks.

items.alt: Tip, clean your gutters before the first big storm.
items.caption:
small chore, big payoff. clogged gutters send water where you don't want it, straight toward your foundation. knock it out before the next big storm. 🌧️

items.alt: Tip, make sure your contractor pulls permits on a big remodel.
items.caption:
boring but important. on a big remodel, make sure your contractor actually pulls permits. unpermitted work can come back to bite you when you sell.

want pros who do it right? compare local quotes at renuehome.com.

items.aside: (a deposit is normal, the whole job is not)

items.caption:
